## LibraryData.ILoadCollectionFromFileTreeParams interface

Parameters used to load collections from a file tree.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ILoadCollectionFromFileTreeParams<TCOLLECTIONID extends string> extends Omit<ICollectionFilterInitParams<TCOLLECTIONID>, 'nameConverter'> 
```
